title: ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. etruscum
intro: Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. etruscum is a subspecies of the Ornithogalum plant, a type of flowering bulbous perennial that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, the Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. etruscum plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. etruscum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
